sections.title: Design

fullText:
Kålormen is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Family Fun in Duhok, Dohuk, Iraq.

"Kålormen" is Danish for "Cabbage Worm".

The ride featured a rotating platform station, allowing it to have 2 trains in operation. This turntable was removed when relocated to Family Fun.

Red track and white supports.

The train is designed to resemble a Caterpillar.
